headline: Norwegian Cruise Cuts Shoreside Staff As Investors Weigh Value And Risks
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NYSE:NCLH) has announced a major corporate restructuring in April 2026. The company plans to reduce its shoreside payroll by up to 20%, mainly affecting senior leadership and administrative roles. These changes follow pressure from activist investors focused on operational efficiency and financial performance. The move has raised concerns about how cost reductions could influence onboard service quality and company culture. Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings...
